Palvolve_AdaptationStone_Normal.Name: Adaptation Stone (Neutral)
Palvolve_AdaptationStone_Normal.Description: A shimmering stone attuned to neutral energy. Lets a bonded Pal adapt into its neutral form once it has reached the required level.
